ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency pair (e.g., EUR/AUD) */,
  "currency_pair_type" TEXT /* Type of currency pair (major, minor, exotic) */,
  "base_currency_decimal_places" INTEGER /* Decimal places for the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_decimal_places" INTEGER /* Decimal places for the quote currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_providers" (
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity provider */,
  "lp_name" TEXT /* Name of the liquidity provider */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the liquidity provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the liquidity provider */,
  "lp_status" TEXT /* Status of the liquidity provider (active, inactive) */,
  "lp_integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration with the liquidity provider (FIX, API, file-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price for the currency pair */,
  "bid_quantity" INTEGER /* Bid quantity for the currency pair */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price for the currency pair */,
  "ask_quantity" INTEGER /* Ask quantity for the currency pair */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (real-time, historical) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (tick-by-tick, minute, hour, day) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_lp_id FOREIGN KEY ("lp_id") REFERENCES liquidity_providers ("lp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint for data ingestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingestion log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "ingestion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the ingestion event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion (success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the ingestion failed */,
  "ingestion_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data ingestion (e.g., every 1 minute, every 1 hour) */,
  "ingestion_last_run_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful ingestion */,
  "ingestion_next_run_time" TEXT /* Scheduled timestamp for the next ingestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_lp_id FOREIGN KEY ("lp_id") REFERENCES liquidity_providers ("lp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of the data quality check (price validation, volume validation) */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the data quality check (pass, fail) */,
  "check_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data quality check */,
  "check_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the data quality issue (critical, warning, info) */,
  "check_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the data quality issue on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, pending) */,
  "user_last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Module name accessed by the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (view, edit) */,
  "module_subsection" TEXT /* Subsection of the module accessed by the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data aggregation */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the aggregation period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the aggregation period */,
  "avg_bid_price" REAL /* Average bid price during the period */,
  "avg_ask_price" REAL /* Average ask price during the period */,
  "total_bid_quantity" INTEGER /* Total bid quantity during the period */,
  "total_ask_quantity" INTEGER /* Total ask quantity during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_lp_id FOREIGN KEY ("lp_id") REFERENCES liquidity_providers ("lp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_snapshot" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data snapshot */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "snapshot_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the snapshot */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price for the currency pair */,
  "bid_quantity" INTEGER /* Bid quantity for the currency pair */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price for the currency pair */,
  "ask_quantity" INTEGER /* Ask quantity for the currency pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signal_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal rule */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal rule (moving average, RSI, etc.) */,
  "rule_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the trading signal rule (e.g., period, threshold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "lp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity provider */,
  "signal_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the signal generation */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal (buy, sell) */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value of the trading signal */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading signal rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_lp_id FOREIGN KEY ("lp_id") REFERENCES liquidity_providers ("lp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES trading_signal_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the report template (e.g., liquidity analysis, price trend) */,
  "template_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the report template (e.g., date range, currency pair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (liquidity analysis, price trend) */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
